grades.expectation: Response references the CLC Accounts Code or subsidiary code
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 'CLC Accounts Code' multiple times throughout the response

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific obligations: designated client account, reconciliation, interest
grades.reason: Covers all three - client account requirements, monthly reconciliations, and duty to pay interest with detailed explanations

grades.expectation: Response covers the requirement for accountant's reports
grades.reason: Dedicated section on Annual Accountant's Report including submission timeline and qualified report procedures

grades.expectation: Response mentions that CLC Code of Conduct prevails where subsidiary codes conflict
grades.reason: No mention of hierarchy between codes or what happens when codes conflict

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CLC client money rules from SRA Accounts Rules
grades.reason: No comparison or distinction made between CLC and SRA rules
